Title: Verify GET /users returns 200 with valid list
Test Step: Send a GET request to the endpoint '/users'.
Step Expected: The API should return a 200 status code with a list of users.

Title: Verify GET /users returns 401 when unauthorized
Test Step: Send a GET request to the endpoint '/users' without an auth token.
Step Expected: The API should return a 401 status code.

Title: Verify POST /users creates user successfully
Test Step: Send a POST request to '/users' with valid name and email.
Step Expected: The API should return a 201 status code.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when email is missing
Test Step: Send a POST request to '/users' with name but missing email.
Step Expected: The API should return a 400 status code.

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when additional unsupported fields are included in the payload
Test Step: Send a POST request to /users with payload {'name': 'John Doe', 'email': 'test@example.com', 'unsupported_field': 'unsupported value'}
Step Expected: System should return a 400 status code

Title: Verify GET /users fails with 500 when server error occurs
Test Step: Send a GET request to /users endpoint
Step Expected: System should return a 500 status code

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 415 when Content-Type is not application/json
Test Step: Send a POST request to /users with payload {'name': 'John Doe', 'email': 'test@example.com'} and content-type Text/XML
Step Expected: System should return a 415 status code

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 422 when email is too long
Test Step: Send a POST request to /users with a payload where 'email' exceeds allowed character limit. Example payload: {'name': 'John Doe', 'email': 'a'*101+'@example.com'}
Step Expected: System should return a 422 status code

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 422 when name is too long
Test Step: Send a POST request to /users with a payload where 'name' exceeds allowed character limit. Example payload: {'name': 'a'*256, 'email': 'test@example.com'}
Step Expected: System should return a 422 status code

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 429 when the rate limit is exceeded
Test Step: Send multiple POST requests to /users endpoint in a short duration of time
Step Expected: System should return a 429 status code

Title: Verify GET /users handles an empty user list and returns 200
Test Step: Ensure that there are no users in the database
Send a GET request to /users endpoint
Step Expected: System should return a 200 status code with an empty list

Title: Verify POST /users fails with 400 when name and email are both missing
Test Step: Send a POST request to /users with payload {}
Step Expected: System should return a 400 status code

Title: Verify GET /users returns consistent response format
Test Step: Send a GET request to /users endpoint
Step Expected: System should return a 200 status code and the response should follow the specified schema
